subject: {{participant_fname}}, This One's Just for You
body:
Hi {{participant_fname}},

You've unlocked an exclusive offer, just for you: 40% off your next purchase, online or in store. This isn't a sitewide deal, it's a personal thank-you for being one of our top customers.

Claim My Offer

Offer expires in 48 hours and is tied to your account, so don't miss it.

Old Navy
